info.title: Nevermined API
info.description:
API for managing AI agents, payment plans, and x402 payments in the Nevermined ecosystem.

## Prerequisites

You need a Nevermined API Key to authenticate. Get one at [nevermined.app](https://nevermined.app) under **Settings > API Keys**.

See the [5-Minute Setup Guide](/docs/integrate/quickstart/5-minute-setup) for detailed instructions.

tags.name: Protocol - Agents
tags.description: Endpoints for registering and managing AI agents

tags.name: Protocol - Plans
tags.description: Endpoints for creating and managing payment plans

tags.name: Protocol - Credits

tags.name: Protocol - Access
tags.description: Endpoints for access tokens and request validation

post.description: Creates a new AI agent with API configuration.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Get paginated list of agents for the current user.
Retrieves agent configuration and associated plans.

post.description: Creates both an agent and associated payment plan in a single request.

put.description: Controls the agent's public listing status.

parameters.name: activate
parameters.description: true to list, false to unlist

post.description: Associates an existing payment plan with an agent.

delete.description: Disassociates a payment plan from an agent.

get.description: Lists all payment plans associated with an agent.

post.description: Validates access and initializes an agent request session.
Records task completion and credit consumption for complex agent workflows.
Creates a new payment plan with pricing and credit configuration.

get.description: Get paginated list of payment plans for the current user.
Retrieves details about a specific payment plan.

put.description: Controls the plan's public listing status.

parameters.name: activate
parameters.description: true to list, false to unlist

post.description: Purchases a payment plan. Credits are issued immediately.

get.description: Retrieves credit balance for a specific account on a plan.

parameters.name: holderAddress
parameters.description: Wallet address to check balance for

get.description: Lists all agents associated with a payment plan.
Generates access credentials for agent-plan interaction.

post.description: Adds credits to a plan account. Builder-only operation.
Adds time-limited credits to a plan account.
Consumes credits from a plan account after processing a request.
Creates a delegated permission and generates an x402 access token.

get.description: Retrieves paginated list of your delegated permissions.
Retrieves complete information about a specific permission.

delete.description: Invalidates a delegated permission, preventing further use.

post.description: Validates a delegated permission before processing a request.
Finalizes and records delegated permission usage after service delivery.

Creates a spending delegation for the authenticated user against a previously enrolled payment method. For fiat-backed delegations (stripe/braintree/visa) the response includes a signed JWT (`delegationToken`); for crypto (erc4337) flows the token is held client-side and omitted. Requires a Nevermined API key.
post.summary: Create a spending delegation and return a signed JWT token

get.description: Returns a paginated list of the authenticated user's spending delegations. Use `accessible=true` to return only delegations the requesting API key may spend against. Requires a Nevermined API key.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: accessible
parameters.description: When "true", return only delegations accessible to the requesting API key (filters by apiKeyId, Active status, expiry, and remaining budget)

get.summary: List all delegations for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns the full details of a single delegation owned by the authenticated user, including remaining budget and last-used timestamp. Requires a Nevermined API key.

parameters.name: delegationId
parameters.description: UUID v4 of the delegation to fetch.

get.summary: Get delegation details including remaining budget

delete.description: Revokes a delegation owned by the authenticated user and cascade-revokes its linked permissions. For Visa delegations the linked VGS intent is cancelled best-effort. Requires a Nevermined API key.

parameters.name: delegationId
parameters.description: UUID v4 of the delegation to revoke.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of charge transactions recorded against a delegation owned by the authenticated user. Requires a Nevermined API key.

parameters.name: delegationId
parameters.description: UUID v4 of the delegation whose transactions are listed.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 10.

get.description: Returns the saved payment methods for the authenticated user. Requires a Nevermined API key.

parameters.name: accessible
parameters.description: When "true", return only payment methods accessible to the requesting API key (filters by allowedApiKeyIds and Active status).

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: When set, return only payment methods backed by this provider. Omit to return methods from every provider (default).

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

patch.description: Updates a saved payment method, changing its friendly alias and/or the set of NVM API keys allowed to use it. Requires a Nevermined API key.

parameters.name: paymentMethodId
parameters.description: Identifier of the payment method to update

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

404.description: Not Found - Payment method does not exist

delete.description: Revokes (detaches) a saved payment method so it can no longer be used for delegated payments. Requires a Nevermined API key.

parameters.name: paymentMethodId
parameters.description: Identifier of the payment method to revoke

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

404.description: Not Found - Payment method does not exist

agentDefinitionUrl.description: URL to OpenAPI spec, MCP Manifest, or A2A agent card

apiKeyId.description: NVM API Key ID restricted to this delegation. Null = any key can use it.

success.description: Indicates whether the API call was successful

message.description: Message describing the result of the API call

txHash.description: Blockchain transaction hash associated with the API call

httpStatus.description: HTTP status code of the API response

data.description: Additional parameters related to the API call

when.description: Timestamp when the API call was made

delegationToken.description: Signed JWT for fiat-backed delegations (stripe/braintree). Omitted for crypto (erc4337) flows where the signed delegation is held client-side.

allowedApiKeyIds.description: NVM API Key IDs allowed to use this card. Null = any key can use it.

orgId.description: Organization this card belongs to (null = personal).

provider.description: Payment provider type. `stripe` / `braintree` / `visa` / `erc4337` select that rail directly. `vgs` (epic #1958) is a unified VGS-Collect card: a PLAN-AGNOSTIC, portable delegation whose settlement PSP (`stripe` / `braintree`) is resolved AT CHARGE TIME from the plan being paid (`fiatPaymentProvider`), so ONE card can charge ANY PSP (#2082). `delegation.provider` is persisted as the portable `vgs` marker (the concrete charge never sees it — the handler derives the real PSP at settle). Requires a portable `providerPaymentMethodId` (the `CRD…` cardId, which must carry an active network token); `planId` is OPTIONAL — pass it only to BIND the delegation to a single plan.

providerPaymentMethodId.description: Payment-method identifier from the provider. For stripe / braintree this is the saved card; for visa this is the VGS agentic-token id returned by enrollment; for vgs this is the `CRD…` canonical cardId from the unified VGS-Collect enroll. Required for these providers; ignored for erc4337.

consumerPrompt.description: Visa-only: human-readable approval prompt shown to the user during VGS Agentic Auth device binding. Required when provider=visa.
consumerPrompt.example: Allow up to USD 50.00 over 5 transactions

assuranceData.description: Visa-only: opaque assurance payload from the VGS Agentic Auth browser SDK after FIDO/OTP device binding. Required when provider=visa.

spendingLimitCents.description: Maximum spending limit in cents (smallest currency unit)

durationSecs.description: Duration of the delegation in seconds

planId.description: Plan ID to restrict this delegation to. Optional and plan-agnostic by default (#1534), INCLUDING provider=vgs (#2082): a unified VGS card delegation is plan-agnostic and the settlement PSP is resolved at charge time from the plan being paid, so one card can charge any PSP — pass planId only to BIND it to a single plan. EXCEPT provider=visa (the VGS mandate is merchant-scoped, derived from the plan owner; see BCK.VISA.0015), where it is REQUIRED.

merchantAccountId.description: Optional merchant Stripe account ID to restrict payments to

maxTransactions.description: Maximum number of transactions allowed (null = unlimited)

apiKeyId.description: Optional API Key ID (skId) to restrict this delegation to

allowedRecipients.description: erc4337 / Router only: restrict spend to these pay-to addresses — the Router rejects payments to any other recipient. Omit for no recipient restriction.

organizationWalletId.description: erc4337 / Router only (#2230): fund this delegation from an ORGANIZATION wallet instead of the caller's own wallet. The caller must be an admin of the wallet's org. Spend is always capped by the SPENDING member's group budget (the wallet must be shared with the member's group).

alias.description: Optional friendly name for the card

allowedApiKeyIds.description: Array of NVM API Key skId values allowed to use this card. Null or empty = any key can use it.

orgId.description: Move the card to an org (a valid orgId) or to personal (null). Omit to leave unchanged.

apiKeyId.description: NVM API Key ID restricted to this delegation. Null = any key can use it.

bearerAuth.description: Your Nevermined API Key (starts with 'nvm:'). Get one at [nevermined.app](https://nevermined.app) under **Settings > API Keys**.
